prompt: An uncanny monumental portrait that reads at first glance as a single serene human face suspended in darkness, but on closer inspection the face is entirely formed from hundreds of human figures, each one individually visible and each with a different posture, gaze, gesture, and emotional tone. The global image suggests one stable identity, while the local human elements refuse that identity and contradict it. The composition must make the viewer feel that the crowd appears to say something true that none of its members actually say alone. Fine-art surrealism, sculptural realism, museum-quality image, atmospheric depth, soft dramatic lighting, elegant and unsettling, highly detailed, no text, no numbers, no charts, no graphs, no formulas, no symbols, no poster style, no infographic layout, no letters
visual_logic: A coherent face emerges only at crowd level; each person within it behaves differently. The image embodies the mistake of assigning a group-level truth to individuals who do not actually contain it.
